steps.label: Complete without activity / Close ticket
steps.description: Can be automated when resolution is confirmed (e.g. no further action needed).
steps.resolution: Close the task using 'Complete with No Activity'. Kafka Errors resolution Error Error Description Resolution Possible Ticket Resolution BufferExhaustedException This exception indicates that the producer is out of memory and cannot send a message Increase the buffer size using the buffer.memory configuration or reduce the message size. Also, ensure that the producer is not sending messages faster than Kafka can handle Try to fix producer and resume to republish SerializationException This error occurs when the producer is unable to serialize the message Check your serializer configuration and the data you're trying to send. Ensure that the data matches the serializer's expectations If message issue then we can use operational UI to fix and resume TimeoutException The producer waited for an acknowledgment, but it didn't receive any in the configured request.timeout.ms Check if the Kafka brokers are reachable and operational. We might also consider increasing the timeout value or ensure that the acks configuration suits our needs. Resume to republish once its stable again Error Error Description Resolution Possible Ticket Resolution BatchExpiredException A batch of messages expired before being sent to the broker This can be due to network issues or a broker being down. Ensure that your Kafka cluster is healthy and consider adjusting the batch.size or linger.ms configurations Resume to republish once its stable again ProducerFencedException This occurs in transactions when another producer with the same transactional .id has been started Ensure that each producer using transactions has a unique transactional. id or handle the rebalancing logic appropriately Try to fix producer and resume to republish OutOfOrderSequenceException This indicates that a broker received a message with a sequence number that is smaller than the expected next sequence number, which might happen if a producer is fenced and another producer with the same transactional.id takes over Typically this requires a new producer instance to be created Try to fix producer and resume to republish AuthorizationException The producer doesn't have the required permissions to send a message to a topic Ensure that the Kafka producer has the correct ACLs set up or use a different user/principal that Try to fix ACL and republish Error Error Description Resolution Possible Ticket Resolution has the required permissions InterruptException The producer thread was interrupted while sending a message We should aandle the interruption appropriately in our application KafkaException A generic exception that wraps any other unchecked exceptions Investigate the root cause, which should be provided within the exception message or stack trace Fix and resume for republish RecordTooLargeException The producer is trying to send a message larger than the broker's maximum allowed size Increase the broker's message.max.bytes and producer's max.request.size configuration or reduce the size of the message being sent Investigate if message size is valid, if it is then we should change the configuration, if not we should infom the source to republish InvalidTopicException The topic name is not valid. It might be due to invalid characters, or the name length is too long or too short Ensure that the topic name conforms to Kafka's naming standards Investigate the topic name used and the topic name in cluster, try to fix and resume TopicAuthorizationException The producer doesn't have permissions to produce to the specified topic Update the ACLs to grant the required permissions or use a user/principal with the right permissions Update the ACLs to grant the required permissions, resume to republish RecordBatchTooLargeExceptio n The record batch is larger than the configured maximum size Reduce the number of records in a batch or increase the maximum batch size Fix and resume for republish Error Error Description Resolution Possible Ticket Resolution InvalidRecordException The provided record doesn't meet Kafka's internal standards (e.g., negative timestamp) Ensure records being produced are correctly formatted Fix and resume for republish UnknownServerException An unexpected error occurred server-side This is typically transient. Retry might succeed, but if it persists, look at the Kafka broker logs for more details Fix and resume for republish NotEnoughReplicasException The message couldn't be written to the necessary number of replicas as per the producer's acks setting Ensure enough brokers are online and healthy. Check for offline replicas and rectify any broker issues Fix and resume for republish NotEnoughReplicasAfterAppen dException The message was written to the log, but not to the required number of replicas Ensure enough brokers are online and healthy. Check for offline replicas and rectify any broker issues Fix and resume for republish InvalidPartitionException The specified partition is not valid for the topic Ensure the partition number is within the valid range for the topic Ivenstigate, fix and republish ClusterAuthorizationException The producer does not have the DESCRIBE permission on the CLUSTER Adjust the ACLs to grant the required permissions Try to fix ACL and republish InvalidTimestampException The timestamp of a record is outside Ensure the timestamp is within Ivenstigate the message, use Operation UI for Error Error Description Resolution Possible Ticket Resolution the acceptable range the acceptable boundaries bad message and republish UnsupportedForMessageForma tException Certain features (like message headers) are not supported for the message format used in the topic Update the message format version of the topic or refrain from using the unsupported features Ivenstigate the message, use Operation UI for bad message and republish InvalidRecordKeyException The record key is not valid Ensure the key being used for the record conforms to Kafka's requirements Ivenstigate the message, use Operation UI for bad message and republish PolicyViolationException The request violated a policy set on the broker Ensure the produced records and the way they're sent comply with the broker's policy Ivenstigate the message, use Operation UI for bad message and republish

steps.resolution: If the attributes in the error message are marked as Group Fields A+B 2 Step 2.1.: If the error is missing validation error, browse the Update Order Screen within the suitable Product Spec from the Task and Add missing field with value or Update the missing value. Step 2.2.: else the error is format validation error browse the Update Order Screen and set the correct format for this field per Appendix A below. Step 2.3. Press Submit Step 2.4. steps.label: Contact L2 / U-verse
steps.description: L2 / U-verse support involvement; manual handoff and follow-up.
steps.resolution: Else the attributes in the error message are marked as Group Fields C+D Step 3.1.: Turn to L2 Support Team and notify about the error message and field Step 3.2.: Per L2 Support Team advice Press Cancel Order or Complete without Activity Appendix A: Per SMG validation format rules: Field Name Validation Format Rule AGAUTH Y OR N VER_ID_REQ 00  99 D_TSENT MMDDYYYYHHMM DATED MMDDYYYY BILLFIRSTNM Valid Values: Limited 7-Bit ASCII Minus [excluding Hex values 09, 0A, 0D] BILLLASTNM Valid Values: Limited 7-Bit ASCII Minus [excluding Hex values 09, 0A, 0D] STATE NPDI: A, B, C RETOSSP must be Y, N, or D ZIP_CODE Canadian SMG Valid Format: xxxxx-xxxx for US STATE value (five characters being the minimum) 'xxxxxx' or 'xxx xxx' or 'xxx-xxx' for Canadian STATE/Province value (x being a required alphanumeric character) Values: Alphanumeric Plus values [including Hex values 20 or 2D] COUNTRY Alpha values ACCT Alphanumeric values PSWD_PIN U.S. SMG Values: Limited 7-Bit ASCII Minus [excluding Hex values 09, 0A, 0D] Canadian SMG Values: Limited 8-Bit ASCII Minus [excluding Hex values 09, 0A, 0D] LRN Values: Numeric values Format: NPANXXXXXX

steps.label: Other
steps.description: Manual resolution - review and define automation opportunity.
steps.resolution: Use the below syntax to prepare the path of the incorrect characteristic in product order as input to Update the Product Order Step 4.a: The syntax for patch path is "shortcut semantics" This means no duplications of same attributes, and no need to specify array indexes, the indications are in the patch path queries By selecting some inner attribute in the PO json payload like .orderItem[0].orderItem[1].product.referenceId please specify the general path which is /orderItem/product/referenceId Add queries are for the most inner attributes related to the identifier names given in the "/" part e.g. /orderItem/product/referenceId?orderItem.id=....79544&product.referenceId=...d4a00 The last identifierName (in the / part) that is corresponding with the last query, this is the element that will be the candidate for the patching For a single attribute patching inside one can add another /<identifierName> inside that candidate and this is the attribute that will be patched (Optional ofc)

steps.label: Other
steps.description: Manual resolution - review and define automation opportunity.
steps.resolution: Check with IDP-CAMS team on why ack was not received. Get OC order ID if order submitted successfully. CAMS Distro: DL-AcctSnapshotDev@list.att.com; IDP_ORCH_SERVICE@list.att.com; a. If Order could not be submitted successfully by CAMS, IDP-CAMS to fix issue and re-submit order to OC. b. If Order was submitted by CAMS and order id is available, check order status in OC with Get Product Order API. i. OC support team to fix the order to send promotion change event to remove cross sell promotion to iPaaS. ii. Note: the most probable cause is due to order stuck in OC, If Order is stuck in OC, then inform OC support team to fix it.

If Order could not be submitted successfully by CAMS, IDP-CAMS to fix issue and re-submit order to OC. b. If Order was submitted by CAMS and order id is available, check order status in OC with Get Product Order API. i. OC support team to fix the order to send promotion change event to remove cross sell promotion to iPaaS. ii. Note: the most probable cause is due to order stuck in OC, If Order is stuck in OC, then inform OC support team to fix it. 2. Once issue is fixed ,ensure the link uniquely identified with AIA customer Id, wireless BAN and cross sell promotion id is marked as inactive. Grace Period End date and Wait Period End dates are cleared. 3. Close the ticket using 'Complete with no Activity'

steps.description: L2 / U-verse support involvement; manual handoff and follow-up.
steps.resolution: If Step Name = RequestSOM or RequestSVO, then press Cancel. If Step Name = Request Shipping or 'Initiate Shipping' Manually route the task to Sales Force group to follow next steps of resolution as suggested by Sales Force case. *OH Supported Actions:  If the SUCCESS response is available from External application OG, below action can be taken for resolution 1. Update below order characteristics/extensions 1. Chars:  Manufacturer  Model  SKU  SKU_With_Prefix  IMEI_Type  LTE_Type  IMSI 2. Extension Shipping_Date and Delivered_Date 3.Extension ASYNC_SMG_MODE 2. Click on Complete Skip  If timeout is due to missing OG Delivered notification, following Sky Actions are Supported: o Update order & Skip Update order with missing delivery dates as part of equipment extension in Product Order & Skip the step according to Sky capabilities. o Cancel Order  If timeout is due to missing OG Shipment notification: o Update order & Skip Update relevant missing Shipping resources with device Details and shipped (i.e. Shipping_Date) and delivery date (i.e Delivered_Date) according to SCOR confirmation and Sky capabilities. o Cancel Order *If original order was CANCEL order, then only skip action is supported for this error (after approval from timed out external system). For additional resolution please contact L2 team. If Step Name= RequestPortIn Or Step Name=Complete Port In For RequestPortIn follow below steps Manually connect to SMG team to seek support ,and please follow next steps as suggested in PortIn request callback notification If timeout is due to PortIn request callback notification from SMG not arrived: 1)Seek support from SMG support team via phone call. 2) a) If SMG team confirms PQI request is not received perform complete retry action b) If SMG support team confirms PQI request is received, please Revert action by following below steps: b.1 Please Update order with extension ASYNC_SMG_MODE after consulting with SMG support and set it as yes b.2 Initiate a Complete retry with new Async smg mode b.3 Notify SMG team by phone call to resend notification missing stage, as needed @Note to OH: make sure no new PQI request is sent to SMG For Complete Port In follow below steps If timeout is due to Activation request callback notification from SMG not arrived: 1)Seek support from SMG support team via phone call. 2) If SMG team confirms SOA1028, SOA1029 or SOA1030 was sent perform complete SKIP action for complete port in step. 3) If SMG team confirms SOA1028, SOA1029 or SOA1030 was NOT then check with SMG and OH L2 for further steps.

steps.label: Other
steps.description: Manual resolution - review and define automation opportunity.
steps.resolution: Use the below syntax to prepare the path of the incorrect characteristic in product order as input to Update the Product Order Step 4.a: The syntax for patch path is "shortcut semantics" This means no duplications of same attributes, and no need to specify array indexes, the indications are in the patch path queries By selecting some inner attribute in the PO json payload like .orderItem[0].orderItem[1].product.referenceId please specify the general path which is /orderItem/product/referenceId Add queries are for the most inner attributes related to the identifier names given in the "/" part e.g. /orderItem/product/referenceId?orderItem.id=....79544&product.referenceId=...d4a00 The last identifierName (in the / part) that is corresponding with the last query, this is the element that will be the candidate for the patching For a single attribute patching inside one can add another /<identifierName> inside that candidate and this is the attribute that will be patched (Optional ofc)

steps.description: Can be automated when resolution is confirmed (e.g. no further action needed).
steps.resolution: In case that you cant handle the item /Item not resolved * Change the priority value to high M & P Name: OrderResolverMS Connectivity Issue Project Name: Owner Name: Document Location: Owner Contact #: Creation Date Defect ID Automated? N * Unmark the Is Resolved check box * Complete the task Appendix: Review Checklist: The reviewing GL go through the list and add comments as required In case the M&P complies, please answer Y For the full checklist : M&P Review Checklist No. Topic Review Questions AE GL Comments VPO GL Comments 1 Business Is it clear from reading the M&P, and without getting into too many technical details, how the problem was solved, and what are the required steps to execute? 2 When M&P involves application other than OMS it must be review by Other application FP. 3 Verify that M&P is not creating failures in the next steps (for example  wrong fix in NB can cause failure in AAM) 4 Verify M&P includes clear description of the problem and what is the revenue effect if exist 5 Verify that the M&P is updating the tracking tables. 6 Quantification query should be accurate as possible . 7 After the order cleared need to make sure the M&P didnt not break the sync between OMS and CRM\CM\AAM 8 Ensure that the fix doesn't break the offer cardinality (in case it must break ,need to suggest to CSR to create new order to replace offer to other) 9 Coding standards Its recommended to use "Toad" to create the SQL command sentences , and to keep the formatting when copying to word . 10 The command name (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, etc.) should start on a new line. 11 The operands/words should be delimited by one blank, using a comma before the blank where needed. 12 A semicolon (;), which signifies the end of a sentence, should always be placed at the end of the last operand of the sentence. In COBOL for DB2, use END-EXEC, and place it in a new column exactly under the EXEC-SQL statement. 13 Comments should be written in lower case. 14 Maintainability Avoid using SELECT * or INSERT without specifying column names 15 In the ORDER BY clause, use only column names (not column positions). 16 Keep queries simple. Use multiple simple queries instead of one complex query. 17 For each table in a JOIN or a sub-query, assign the table logical name (or short name or correlation name) in the FROM clause of the SELECT statement. 18 Proper algorithms Never put commit in the end of the update query, first run it without commit to see if the update number of rows is reasonable . 19 Always make sure that you have correct where clause in case of Update script(make sure that you have the semi colon in the end of the where clause and not before it ). 20 Update fields must be sure its correct to the declared domain in TBDomain, in case of properties can be check the domain in tbproperty. 21 Performance Whenever you need to write complicated queries (such as JOIN with more than two tables) Consult your ADBA check the additional performance relatated items 22 Make sure that query dont run more over then 2 min ,if still running - kill it . 23 Use the checks to see the performance of query before running it (select the query and press CTRL E).
